patches.hypothesis: The NullPointerException is due to the absence of <body> in documents containing framesets, as framesets replace the <body> tag.
patches.changes:
+ Document body check
+ Conditional copySafeNodes only if body is present
patches.diff:
+ Document body check
+ Conditional copySafeNodes only if body is present

patches.hypothesis: The method encounters a NullPointerException because the `body()` method returns null for a document with a frameset tag, which is not handled.

The NullPointerException occurs because the body() method is called on the document which uses frameset elements instead of a regular body. The fix requires handling cases where the body element may not be present.
patches.changes: - Ensure that we have a valid body element to work with; if not present, use a different logic
patches.diff: - Ensure that we have a valid body element to work with; if not present, use a different logic
